model_tasks: func. department demands to fill the post

additional_tasks: func. department demands to fill the post

two_wrong_sequences_best_pair.task_a: func. department demands to fill the post

user_text: The process begins when the functional department makes a request to fill a vacant position. Once this demand is made, the next step is to advertise the post to attract potential candidates. Following the advertisement, applicants submit their applications for the position. After receiving the applications, the next step involves reviewing and checking these applications to assess the suitability of the candidates. Once the applications have been thoroughly checked, the process proceeds to filling the post with the most suitable candidate. The process concludes after the position has been successfully filled.
output_text: The process begins when the functional department identifies a need to fill a vacant position. Once this demand is established, the next step involves checking the applications that have been received. Following this, applicants are invited to apply for the position. To ensure that potential candidates are aware of the opportunity, the position is advertised. After the advertisement has been made and applications have been received and checked, the process proceeds to filling the post with a suitable candidate. The process concludes once the position has been successfully filled.
